chargingFaq.q: How long does AC charging take on a 11 kW home/work charger?
chargingFaq.a: Indicative full charge (0–100%) around 7 hours at 11 kW AC — actual time depends on SoC window, ambient temperature, and onboard charger limits.

chargingFaq.q: What should I expect at a DC fast charger?
chargingFaq.a: Plan for roughly 32 minutes from 10–80% when the charger delivers near the vehicle's 175 kW peak — route and battery temperature affect real sessions.

chargingFaq.q: Is this suitable for apartment buyers?
chargingFaq.a: With overnight AC charging, many city buyers cover daily use well below the 483 km ARAI claim — confirm society charger permissions before purchase.

editorialNarratives.ownership: Ownership on mahindra EVs is generally practical for Indian buyers who value predictable service intervals and an 8-year battery warranty narrative. Resale confidence is modeled at 74/100 — interpret as editorial guidance, not a guarantee.
editorialNarratives.charging: Home or workplace AC charging at 11 kW is well suited for overnight top-ups; DC sessions around 32 minutes (10–80%) are practical for planned highway stops — not a fuel-station-style minute fill; against a certified 483 km ARAI figure.
editorialNarratives.familySuitability: Family suitability scores 82/100 in our model — well suited for small families with regular city and weekend use; boot space around 452 L should be checked against your stroller or luggage routine.
editorialNarratives.firstTimeEv: First-time EV friendliness is rated 72/100 with anxiety-reduction at 72/100. This variant is practical for buyers who want clear warranty terms and manageable charging habits — less ideal if you expect zero planning on long routes.
editorialNarratives.compare: In the mid suv set on EVSavari, this variant is better aligned with buyers who prioritise born-electric platform; trade-off: new nameplate — resale data limited.
